description_long: A young adult woman stands confidently, dressed in a modern, edgy urban outfit. She wears a fitted crop top with asymmetrical sleeves—one long and one sleeveless—paired with distressed skinny jeans adorned with patches and accessories such as a chain belt and utility pouches. Her look is completed by a slouchy beanie, fingerless gloves, and chunky combat boots, giving her a streetwise appearance. Visible accessories include a belt with attached pouches and a holster-like item, suggesting a practical, utilitarian style. Her hair is styled in a short, straight bob, and her makeup is bold, with dark lipstick and eye shadow. The overall impression is of a fashionable, self-assured pedestrian ready for an urban environment.
description: A stylish young woman in an edgy, asymmetrical crop top, distressed jeans, and combat boots, accessorized with a beanie, gloves, and utility pouches. Her look is modern, practical, and streetwise.
description_view_0: Front view shows the asymmetrical crop top, utility belt, gloves, and confident stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the beanie, the long sleeve, and the pouches on her belt.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the crop top, chain belt, and additional details on the jeans and accessories.
description_view_3: Right side view displays the sleeveless arm, side pouches, and the profile of the boots.
attribute_clothing_type: asymmetrical crop top, distressed skinny jeans, fingerless gloves, beanie, utility belt with pouches, combat boots
